name: Amazon Web Services Cloud Platform Starting Playbook
creator: 28ff3096-2a98-4634-bc6c-bb0b19eacc62
description: Amazon Web Services Cloud Platform Starting Playbook provides reference implementation of how Amazon Web Services Cloud Platform alerts can be processed in Google SecOps.

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Tag
steps.description: Add given tag to the case the current alert is grouped to

steps.name: AWS Enrichment
steps.description: This block retrieves EC2 instance data associated with the case and provides context for other actions or analysis.

steps.name: AWS Users Containment
steps.description: An embedded workflow that can receive inputs and return an output.

steps.name: GTI Enrichment
steps.description: This block enhances case entities with Google Threat Intelligence enrichment information. Works for IPs, URLs, hostnames, domains, hashes (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256), threat actors, and CVEs.

steps.name: AWS EC2 Containment
steps.description: This block allows the playbook to automatically stop EC2 instances that were identified in the alert as potentially compromised or suspicious, supporting the containment phase of the incident response process.

parameters.name: NestedWorkflowSteps
parameters.value: [{"identifier":"80493f4c-0c45-4a4f-9ad4-36bc8a6dab84","integration":"Flow","actionName":"IfFlowCondition","instanceName":"Init Remediation Variable","stepType":4},{"identifier":"ab899475-2030-4b42-b72a-3f458fdcd13b","integration":"Flow","actionName":"EntitySelection","instanceName":"AWS EC2 Filter","stepType":0},{"identifier":"aff01611-87be-4448-bd3e-f7527434fabe","integration":"Flow","actionName":"IfFlowCondition","instanceName":"Has EC2 instance and AWS configured?","stepType":4},{"identifier":"e82b5ab4-d708-4171-9062-e886ac6f71bd","integration":"Flow","actionName":"MultiChoiceQuestion","instanceName":"Stop EC2 Instance?","stepType":1},{"identifier":"ec21b730-635b-42c6-b03c-f1bbb761b875","integration":"SiemplifyUtilities","actionName":"SiemplifyUtilities_Count Entities In Scope","instanceName":"Count Ec2","stepType":0}]

steps.name: MITRE Enrichment
steps.description: This block retrieves detailed information about MITRE ATT&CK techniques and their associated mitigations, providing valuable context to understand adversary behaviors and possible defensive actions.

steps.name: Set Initial Severity
steps.description: This block sets the initial alert score based on the SIEM detection severity or the rule metadata severity label.

steps.name: Google SecOps Enrichment
steps.description: This block retrieves relevant details about users and assets involved in the case, enhancing the context available for analysis and subsequent actions within Google SecOps SOAR.

steps.name: Alert Priority
steps.description: This block sets the alert priority using a previously defined playbook variable, ensuring consistent prioritization logic for the case workflow.
